programs.title: The Perfect Score
programs.desc: Scarlett Johansson, Erika Christensen, Chris Evans and Darius Miles lead this coming-of-age tale about six students who break into the testing center and steal the answers to the S.A.T.

programs.title: The Guilt Trip
programs.desc: "Barbra Streisand and Seth Rogen are the perfect comedy duo"* as they embark on one mother of a road trip! When Andy invites his mom on an 8-day, 3,000-mile journey across the country, the farther they go, the closer they get. *Jake Hamilton, FOX-TV

programs.title: Orange County
programs.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programs.title: Footloose
programs.desc: City kid Ren MacCormack moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing have been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.
